name: distillery
description: Knowledge base skills for Claude Code — capture, search, and synthesize project knowledge
author: norrietaylor

skills.name: distill
skills.description: Captures session knowledge and stores distilled decisions and insights. Triggered by: 'distill', 'capture this', 'save knowledge', 'log learnings', or '/distill [content]'.

skills.name: recall
skills.description: Performs semantic search over the Distillery knowledge base. Triggered by: 'recall', 'search knowledge', 'what do we know about', 'find in knowledge base', or '/recall <query>'.

skills.name: pour
skills.description: Synthesizes knowledge from multiple entries into a cohesive narrative with citations. Triggered by: 'pour', 'synthesize', 'what's the full picture on', 'deep dive into', or '/pour <topic>'.

skills.name: bookmark
skills.description: Saves a URL and its auto-generated summary to the knowledge base. Triggered by: 'bookmark', 'save this link', 'store this URL', 'remember this page', or '/bookmark <url> [#tags]'.

skills.name: minutes
skills.description: Captures and manages meeting notes in the knowledge base. Triggered by: 'minutes', 'meeting notes', 'capture meeting', 'log meeting', '/minutes', '/minutes --update <meeting_id>', or '/minutes --list'.

skills.name: classify
skills.description: Classifies knowledge entries and manages the manual review queue. Triggered by: 'classify', 'classify entry', 'review queue', 'triage inbox', or '/classify [entry_id|--inbox|--review]'.

skills.name: watch
skills.description: Manages monitored feed sources with auto-poll scheduling. Triggered by: 'watch', '/watch list', '/watch add <url>', '/watch remove <url>'.

skills.name: radar
skills.description: Generates an ambient intelligence digest from recent feed entries. Triggered by: 'radar', '/radar', 'what's new', 'show my digest'.

skills.name: tune
skills.description: Displays and adjusts feed relevance thresholds. Triggered by: 'tune', '/tune', 'adjust thresholds'.

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Onboarding wizard — verifies MCP connectivity, detects transport, registers MCP connector, configures auto-poll. Triggered by: 'setup', '/setup', 'configure distillery'.

distillery.description: Distillery knowledge base MCP server — stores, searches, and classifies knowledge entries using DuckDB with vector similarity search

setup.message: The Distillery MCP server must be configured before using these skills. Choose a transport below and add the configuration to your Claude Code settings.

transports.label: Local (stdio)
transports.description: Run the MCP server locally via the installed distillery-mcp command. Requires Python 3.11+ and pip install.

transports.label: Hosted (HTTP/SSE)
transports.description: Connect to the hosted Distillery MCP server. No local installation required.
